tasks.label: 📚 Publish Spike Editor
args: if (!(Test-Path 'docs')) { mkdir docs }; if (!(Test-Path 'docs/utils')) { mkdir 'docs/utils' -Force | Out-Null }; Copy-Item 'index.html' 'docs/index.html' -Force; Copy-Item 'utils/utils.js' 'docs/utils/utils.js' -Force; git add .; git commit -m 'Publish-Spike-Editor'; git push origin main; Write-Host '✅ Published!' -ForegroundColor Green
